Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CARLETTA JACKSON-LANE'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is granted. Defendant has been aware since July 2014 that Plaintiff intended to amend the Complaint, and Plaintiff was, to a degree, complicit in the delay. (See, e.g., Silverstein Decl. Para. 4 [Defendant sought additional time to consider the stipulation]; see also id. Para. 5 [Defendant requested further information before responding to Plaintiff's request to stipulate].) Further, California adheres to a liberal policy in favor of permitting amendments to the Complaint. Both parties' requests regarding the trial date are denied without prejudice. The parties may seek a trial continuance before the Presiding Judge in Department 206. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2014 Set For Trial On Mar-09-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
